    Serialized Form

    • Package util

      • Class util.AmountRenderer

        class AmountRenderer extends DefaultTableCellRenderer implements Serializable

      • Class util.CategoryPillRenderer

        class CategoryPillRenderer extends DefaultTableCellRenderer implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • categories
            List<Category> categories
            Ordered list of categories, used to assign consistent colours by index.

      • Class util.DefaultDarkRenderer

        class DefaultDarkRenderer extends DefaultTableCellRenderer implements Serializable

      • Class util.GaugePanel

        class GaugePanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • percentage
            double percentage
            Fill fraction of the gauge arc, from 0.0 (empty) to 1.0 (full).
          • unit
            String unit
            Unit label displayed below the value (e.g., "EGP").
          • value
            String value
            Numeric value displayed in the centre of the gauge (e.g., daily limit).
